name: feature-gap-dashboard
description: Local-only dashboard that finds feature gaps between hyperswitch-web and hyperswitch-client-core and generates local patches.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run sync -w server
